---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What do you want to add?
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

## Why is this useful?
Explain how this helps the app or the team.

## Any ideas on how it should look or work?
Describe the expected behavior, or paste mockups/screenshots if you have them.
